community.name: Galaxy Nightclub
community.description: Step into the pulse of the cosmos at Galaxy Nightclub‚ a dazzling interstellar venue orbiting style‚ sound‚ and surreal spectacle․ This isn't just a clubit's a celestial experience․ Neon constellations swirl across the walls‚ zero-gravity dance floors shimmer beneath your feet‚ and holographic bartenders serve drinks that glow like quasars․ Whether you're grooving under a meteor shower of laser lights or chilling in the asteroid lounge with panoramic views of nebulae‚ every corner of Galaxy Nightclub is designed to transport you beyond the stars․ Featuring immersive soundscapes‚ animated visuals‚ and themed events that defy gravity‚ this is the ultimate destination for spacefarers‚ stargazers‚ and VR voyagers alike․ Dress to impress‚ vibe like a supernova‚ and let the beats launch you into orbit

community.name: Legions Of Chaos
community.description: The Legions of Chaos is a VRChat PCVR Avatar PVP Group, which uses the Avatar PVP system created by GoFluffYaSelf!

community.name: AsherisVT
community.description:
The Asheris VTuber is a group that belongs to the new Irish VTuber called Asheris․

I run the YouTube channel AsherisVT‚ where I focus on tours‚ stories‚ discussions‚ poetry‚ and more․ On my VRChat journey‚ I am accompanied by my pigeon ally‚ who likes to call my head its home․

I hold a diploma in journalism‚ and during my time‚ I spent several years covering video games‚ events‚ interviews‚ community⁄online radio‚ and more․ 

TOURS - The tours will see me explore and talk about VRChat worlds I've discovered or that I think viewers may find interesting․ 

STORIES - The stories I share are based on my experiences in life and as a journalist․ Some potential stories could be about interviews‚ events‚ and review processes‚ amongst others․

DISCUSSIONS - The discussions will primarily focus on VRChat․ Discussions can potentially include new updates‚ new items‚ news‚ and more․ 

POETRY - The poetry I read is my own creations from pen to paper to video․ What I read and write is heavily based on my life experiences․

AND MORE - Sometimes I will talk about things unrelated to any predetermined topics․ This may include videos of me having fun in VRChat or my notorious voice acting․

community.name: Local Police Department
community.description:
Welcome the LPD, one of VRChats oldest and largest roleplaying groups bringing entertainment to public lobbies since 2018. The LPD hosts daily VRChat events where officers are assigned to a squad to create roleplay scenarios in public lobbies, themed around interactions with the public and emergency services. Due to the nature of improv, anything can happen during these events. From drug busts and shootouts, to checking mirror dwelling licenses. 

To join the LPD check out the recruitment channel on our Discord at <color=#7289daff>discord.gg/lpd</color>. There you will find the application form as well as our handbook which is packed with all kinds of important information. Once accepted you will go through cadet training, before jumping into patrolling VRChat as an official LPD officer. When you have some experience under your belt you can take additional training to move up the ranks or specialize into other kinds of roleplay that we offer.

Patrol officers will arrest people and bring them to the LPD station to take their mugshot that then gets posted on our discord server for everyone to see. If they choose to not come quietly we have our swat team, known as SLRT, to help persuade them. Once the suspect has been processed they will be handed over to our Corrections Officers and given a nice new home in the LPD Prison with all the other prisoners. And if anyone gets hurt in the process they can be treated by the LMT at our Hospital. To find out how you can help keep the streets of VRChat safe, join our Discord or follow us on Twitter @LPD_vr.

community.name: Yukio's World Works
community.description: It is my world work because i make maps for VRChat and on jinxxy

community.name: The Goats from the Twilight Garden
community.description: The Goats From the Twilight Garden is an Undertale/Deltarune community where humans and monsters, mainly Asriel/Ralsei/Flowey kins gather to share their love for these characters and games. We also like to host many different types of events such as celebrations, gaming, and roleplay events.

community.name: Bump n' Bash
community.description:
Bump n' Bash is a PvP Game World! 
Send your foes flying across soaring skies‚ erupting volcanoes‚ and even deep space with a well-timed punch in this platform fighter meets party gameǃ The more damage you take‚ the higher you're launchedǃ

Supports up to 64 players on PC, Quest, iOS, and even Desktop! With over 15 stages, 12 unique gamemodes, and unlockable skins via achievements with zero microtransactions, there's no end to the fun! 

So grab your friends and join the bash! 
And if you join the group, you'll get to experience play sessions with the developers and beta tests for future featuresǃ

アップデート、お知らせ、新コンテンツの先行公開、そして開発者とのテストプレイ！
格闘 × パーティゲームの決定版！一撃必殺のパンチで相手を空の彼方、火山、はたまた宇宙まで吹きとばせ！ダメージを食らうほど、威力も増大！

最大64人同時プレイ、QUEST及びIOS対応、全15ステージ、12種類のプレイモード、アイテム課金なし！

このグループは、アップデート、お知らせ、新コンテンツの先行公開、そして開発者とのテストプレイ！

community.name: CozyCon Online
community.description: CozyCon is a free yearly multi-fandom virtual convention on Discord/VRChat/Twitch that runs in September, but also hosts monthly events. We have skilled vendors, DJs and Panelists every year, sweet themed merch designed by our artists, and year-round community space to chat, organize games, share your creative works and much more.

community.name: floofballvr
community.description: Floofy Gaming and Chill is inclusive 18+ social community! We play games and chill here! Also we are dedicated to make meaningful connections, empower creativity and create memories together! Our goal is provide engaging, welcoming experience for both new and experienced members in the community! This community is a safe space for adults! Our staff welcome our newcomers, make introductions, help people connect, and we make sure nobody feels left out or feel lost! You're seen and definitely included from day one!

community.name: The Necron Empire
community.description:
The Necron Empire is a VRChat based Avatar PvP group‚ we use these Avatars to fight Duells all the way to 40 people Battles with the Theme being from Warhammer 40k․ （Dark Sci-Fi）

We enjoy a loose culture in our group and encourage a good‚ fun but semi serious attitude․

Due to how our system works we are a PC only community

community.name: Love Letters to Sci Fi
community.description: Love letters to Sci Fi is a community that explores how sci-fi stories can turn into conversations around humanity, philosophy, and community․ We hold weekly discussion events on classic sci fi shows and also branch out into other topics that come up like wellness․ Events begin with structured presentation by a host and then we hold open discussion․ We pride ourselves as an inclusive moderated community where people bring their love for the topics along with community spirit and kindness for others.

community.name: Megabuilding 325
community.description:
Do you make anything? Music, painting, textures, 3D, 2D, animations, sculptures, etc ? Do you open for commissions? Do you also roleplay? Do you wish you had a virtual store? Do I have your attention yet? Then you should consider joining MEGABUILDING 325!

M325 is a cyberpunk inspired roleplay group. If you enjoy stuff like Ghost in the Shell, Blade Runner, Apex, Titanfall, Akira, The Finals, Cyberpunk and more, then you'll fit right in! We offer creators of all kinds a place to hold a store (no Unity knowledge needed) and do some roleplay with a map that evolves with the players! 

Not a creator? Not a problem! Just come RP, join the guild, run missions and more! Found something cool in a mission? We'll add it to the map! That's right, what you do truly impacts the map here at M325.  Lobbies are every Tuesdays at 7:30 pm eastern. We are also Quest tolerant (Questies be warned, we do not impose players to have Quest avatars. Use your imagination, buddy.)

Started out small on Twitch, followed by YouTube 1-2 years later. She is also representing Wave 2 of Okimi Cafe since October 2022. You may also know her as a Werehog Simp in certain streams from time to time. If you wanted to see some comfy, cozy vibes, along with some chaos into the mix, you're in for a treat!!! community.name: Gozar Productions
community.description:
Gozar Productions is a small company engaging in projects ranging from short films and music videos to Discord bots and Obsidian plugins to live music performances in virtual reality. Birthed from a young girl's aspirations and pet projects, this small company endeavors to share our passions with the world for all to enjoy.

In our VRChat group, we post about my performances and updates on our creative projects, and we also host weekly hangouts, weekly karaoke nights, monthly movie nights, and semi-monthly audience anarchy game nights.

community.name: The Helldivers of VRC

community.name: Pawlygon
community.description:
Pawlygon Studio creates premium face tracking addons, clothing assets, textures, VRChat accessories, and creator tools for the VR and furry communities.

Our goal is to help avatars feel more expressive, polished, and fun to use in VRChat. We create face tracking setups for popular avatars, clothing and texture assets, along with Unity and Blender tools designed to make avatar setup easier for both users and creators.

At our booth, you can:
 • Explore our latest face tracking addons
 • Check out clothing assets, textures, and VRChat accessories
 • Join our community and follow future releases

Links:
 • Booth.pm (https://pawlygon.booth.pm/)
 • Gumroad (https://pawlygon.gumroad.com/)
 • Jinxxy (https://jinxxy.com/Pawlygon)

community.name: 1st Weimar Republic
community.description:
Welcome to the 1st Weimar Republic!

We’re an alternate history VRChat roleplay group based around 1920's Interwar Germany.

We host weekly immersive RP events in the Weimar Republic;
Daily Life of Soldiers
Combat RP
Military Training
Ceremonies

From fighting in the street and countryside against uprisings to simply living out the daily life of a soldier, our events tell an ongoing narrative influenced by all of our members. Want to know more? If Immersive RP, Alt-History or History, and an interesting story appeal to you, then the 1st Weimar Republic is the place for you!

https://discord.gg/ZMP49H3zSY

Join now, become part of our growing community, and leave your mark upon the Republic!

community.name: The Virtual Gauntlet
community.description: The Virtual Gauntlet is a VR game show hosted in VRChat where two teams of four compete in fast-paced, skill-based obstacle course challenges. The show runs in seasons with a strong cyberpunk theme and features unique games like Dodge Wall, Rift Rush, and Grid Lock. We record and stream the matches, promote the teams involved, and offer in-world prizes like trophies and group shoutouts. It's built to spotlight player communities, bring hype energy to VR gaming, and create something exciting for both players and viewers.

community.name: Kemono Union State
community.description: we are a alternat universe military rp group. currently set in the 2100s originating from the remained of Japan after a nuclear war. where kimono/demy humans live and fight to protect there kind against opposing nations and entity level threats.  whe have our own nation/empire and lore that would turn this into a history book with over 5000 words if i put it in here. we have a welcoming staff and admin team that is always working hard to keep the community safe and toxicity free

community.description: Built upon a foundation of love towards the Rindo base model (By Jingo Channel), Rindo cult is a fusion blend of cultures and bases, proud to offer a place of unity and joy to all. Everyone is welcome to shop, chat with others, and even work with us! VRC Kmart is proudly LGBTQIA+ and is dedicated to creating a welcoming, inclusive, and safe space for all!

community.name: The Blood Ravens
community.description: The Blood Ravens are a multi-purpose PVP community and social hub, One of the oldest still running Warhammer Community on VR Chat. Events are hosted regularly by the week, participating in world hops, PVP matches with other Warhammer communities, Laserdome tournaments, game nights, and more. Our leadership team is friendly and active with a large playerbase and many regulars. We welcome any and all to participate and enjoy the community we've grown.

We host educational lessons about social anxiety, communication, and some aspects of psychology. Often paired with a social workshop activity to encourage exploring beyond your comfort zone

Join our Discord at discord.gg/nffc or check out our booth for more info. Enjoy your time at PJKT!

community.name: Failed to Render
community.description: Failed to Render Comedy Club is the longest-standing professional comedy club in virtual reality, every Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday in VRChat!

community.name: Refraction VR
community.description: Refraction VR is a moderated public VRChat group dedicated to providing a safe and inclusive space for LGBTQ+ individuals and allies. We offer a welcoming community where members can connect, express themselves, and find support within the virtual world of VRChat. Come check out our daily instances and weekly events!

community.name: Study-Japanese【 JapaNichijou ジャパ日常 】
community.description:
Our community is made up of people who have come together with the goal of enjoying learning Japanese.  
We host events twice every weekend, where we explore various ways to practice Japanese, including Japanese lessons, games using Japanese Language, and role-playing events that simulate real-life communication.  
If you're interested in Japanese Language or Japanese culture, feel free to stop by and join us! ありがとう！

community.name: The Cathedral
community.description: We are a Goth ＆ Industrial Club who strive for interpersonal connection‚ a unified love of Goth music and culture‚ provide a welcoming space for those who find beauty in the darkness‚ and encourage fellowship in our community․ We have main events every other Sunday, with secondary events that vary.

community.name: Skulls Nightshade - Afterlife

Join for our Bi-weekly hangout events, Take part in our limited timed events where you can express your talent or learn something new, and become a part of something that breaks the mold of reality and shows what it means to be a part of something!!
[Sometimes Chill, Sometimes Chaos, Always Community.] - BunkBox

community.name: VRChat Legends
community.description:
Welcome to VRChat Legends
A community-driven resource documenting the lore, players, groups, worlds, and events of VRChat.

community.name: The Ashen Empire
community.description:
The Ashen empire is a Star wars inspired avatar PvP PC and Quest community. 
We engage in several different forms of combat such as TDM, FFA, hostage rescue, boss battles and many more. We also play games outside of PvP events in both vrchat and other games. We host events most days between 4pm EST and 8pm EST.

community.name: Masked Sanctuary
community.description: Welcome to our little corner of the skies — an angel-themed community built on warmth, kindness, and a touch of chaos. We’re a laid-back and welcoming crew that believes in making genuine connections, sharing good times, and creating memories that stick. Whether you're here to unwind, meet new people, or just be yourself, you’ll always have a place with us. You don’t need wings to feel at home here. Everyone is welcome, and every presence is appreciated. Come join us, and let’s make something special together.

community.name: JP-GH Animations
community.description: I'm a Digital Artist that specializes in Animation and making cool, slick illustrations. I'm also currently working on a full length, VRChat Feature Film.

community.name: United Republic
community.description: The United Republic is a multi-purpose PVP community and social hub, One of the oldest and still running PvP Star wars Communities on VR Chat. Events are hosted regularly by the week, participating in world hops, PVP matches with other Avatar PvP communities, Different types of Light RP, Large Scale Re-Created battles and more. Our leadership team is friendly and active with a large player base and many regulars. We welcome any and all to participate and enjoy the community we've grown!

community.name: Baobab Crossing
community.description: Baobab Crossing delivers Blooming Moments—a celebration of fleeting encounters, cherished connections, and music that resonates beyond the moment.

community.name: Cubee Games
community.description:
Hi! I'm cubee. I make avatars, sometimes worlds, and often things outside VRChat like video games (as the name would imply) and drawings.

At my booth, you can try on some of my avatars and check out (or bookmark) my world, which has more of them including public avatars!

Join my group for news about avatar updates! Have fun at PJKT!

community.name: VRDancing
community.description:
"VRDancing is a beginner-friendly community of dancers that host weekly dance, fitness and hangout events in EU and NA timezones. We welcome any dancer! 

No Full Body Tracking required, some even join without VR! 

Whether you just started and lack confidence, or are a veteran dancer with years of IRL experience, we hope you'll find your place here! 

Our main dancing events are accessible to any skill level and are an excellent place to start dancing in VRChat! "

community.name: MiketronArts
community.description: A welcoming community full of love, creativity and fun!

community.name: Nova Corp
community.description:
Nova Corp is a corporate-themed roleplay group that also tries to expand to other games․ Nova Corp differentiates itself from other roleplay communities by the way we create and roleplay‚ as well as our structure․ Designed from the ground up for immersion‚ paying attention to every detail‚ while also remaining accessible for newcomers to the roleplay scene as well as for hardcore veterans looking to expand their experience․ Everything done in Group Instances is in-character․ Our structure also separates leadership positions from staff positions‚ allowing you to take up a leading role without having the responsibility and activity requirements of being a staff member at the same time․

We will have several playable divisions․ Currently it only includes PMC （Private Military Contractors）‚ but will expand to Police and Logistics in the future․ The PMC Division is similar to military roleplay‚ focusing on recon and tactical engagements․ The Police Sub-Division will focus on apprehension rather than combat and will interact more with the VRChat public․ Logistics will focus on transport which keeps our dynamic economy going‚ delivering material in a wide range of vehicles‚ ranging from vans‚ and trucks‚ to trains‚ ocean-going cargo ships‚ and commercial airliners‚ incorporating all forms of transportation․

Nova Corp currently has the most modern ＆ advanced AI combat system in VRChat‚ utilizing P-Shooters and MacoAI․

community.name: Noved Squad
community.description:
Welcome to the Noved Squadǃ 

Home of the Noved Notes Podcastǃ
A VRChat Podcast that goes into the amazing creators of VRChatǃ

In the Noved Squad Community‚ we do a bunch of hangouts‚ game nights‚ DJ Noved Party Nights‚ and collaborate to make amazing creations on VRChatǃ Overall we just like to have funǃ

We also hold the annual Squad Forever Fest Charity Event in support of the International Association for Suicide Prevention! Learn more at my booth!

community.name: Rusk Empire
community.description:
The continueance of Rusk Shack․ All Rusks are welcomeǃ

We are prospering after the Ruskpocalypse of August 2025 and giving all Rusks of VRC a new home since September 2025․ Join us for weekly Rusk meetings‚ game events and recruitment-⁄Rusk raid events․

We hope to make the Rusk a staple avatar of VRChat again and recreate the hype, keeping the community alive and maybe even reach new highs.

community.description: We are a Star Wars PVP and RP group based in VRCHAT, We do weekly combat event's and daily battalion trainings teaching everyone how to use their weaponry, and to feel how it is to be a storm trooper in the Star Wars Universe. We have two Home Worlds one called ＂ The Eclipse＂ made by GOBLIN' and "The Finalizer " By Solter. The group was created in 2020. We have Commandos, Imperial Army, 501st, 212th and 187th with more options within those battalions. Feel free to text Solter092 on Discord if you have any questions.

community.name: Children of Time

community.name: PrideVR
community.description:
PrideVR is a welcoming, supportive, and inclusive education-based social group. With meetups, game nights, and our beautiful city dedicated to celebrating everything that makes us fabulous.

Our Mission
Cultivating safe‚ accessible‚ and inclusive virtual Pride events and spaces for the community․

Join us to find˸
Explore VRChat's LGBTQIA＋ Communities
Diverse Hangout Events
Game nights

Queeroke!
Alphabet Mafia Role Play
Collaborative community art projects
And our main Pridefest event, Sat Jun 27!

We're Loud ＆ Proudǃ
Say it loud‚ Gay is Proudǃ
Say it loud‚ Trans is Proudǃ
Keep slayin' Pride fam!

community.name: SunBeach Studio
community.description:
SunBeach Studio is a NEW studio focused on creating games for the vrchat community.
The founders mrivanovichh and dracovishjoe joined together to create amazing games full of character and interesting gameplay!
Be sure to look forward to our first public game Maid Mansion Madness launching in October!

About us:
Mr. Ivanovichh is a Vrchat Avatar and World creator, illustrator and musician, member of Forjadores as one of the administrators, lead modeling artist and unity technical artist in Forjaversario Cosmico and Fragmentado.
With the VRC Awards nomination of 2025 for best Chill map for his Spanish Garden map. 
Dracovishjoe is also an Avatar and World creator and editor working on commissions for lots of vrchat types of players.

community.name: Forjadores Hispanic community of VRChat
community.description: We are a community of Hispanic creators that gets together to help and share knowledge about worlds, avatars and general content for VRChat. We have regular events on Sundays and our big event called "Forjaversario" where we celebrate the anniversary of our community.

community.name: Galaxy Fleet Command
community.description: Galaxy Fleet Command is a group of Star Trek enthusiasts in locations scattered around planet earth, who have taken up virtual residence in SecondLife and VRChat. It is here, in this virtual world where we come to live, work and play out our roles as Star Fleet Officers, Shuttle Pilots, Academy Instructors, Engineers, Medical personnel, and various other functions.

community.name: Pablo's Corner
community.description: I upload cool worlds and assets! (e.g. BrainWash Cafe, Pablo's Mic System)

community.name: Tales of Exiles
community.description: Tales of Exile, an immersive, strictly 18+ text-based roleplay server where your choices directly reshape a massive, living universe! Our passion-driven world seamlessly blends anachronistic 1980s technology with high magic and a golden age of piracy, inviting you to hunt for dark relics, overthrow a global shadow government, or forge powerful alliances. Inspired by iconic universes like One Piece, Warhammer, and Star Wars, we offer a unique setting featuring personalized, handcrafted character arcs, homebrewed skill trees, and intricate vehicular mechanics for naval warfare, tank combat, and Age of Sail navigation. Please be advised that our lore does not shy away from heavy, grimdark themes. Including war, complex political intrigue, and deep social divisions. to create a realistic and high-stakes atmosphere. Whether you are a text-RP veteran or a beginner looking for a dedicated, welcoming community, we invite you to step into our world, test your limits, and leave your permanent mark on the history of Tales of Exile!

community.name: Black Wolves Rebellion
community.description:
Black Wolves Rebellion is a VRChat story roleplay created by Ashen Phoenix Games

Sessions are on Thursdays at 6pm EST

It takes place in a sci-fi galaxy where a powerful megacorporation called Lectercorp controls and invades planets, using military force and experiments to maintain its rule. Across the stars, resistance movements rise to fight back and reclaim freedom for the worlds under its control.

Players step directly into this war as members of the rebellion, becoming the main force driving the story forward. Together, they take on missions such as fighting Lectercorp soldiers, dismantling occupation forces, rescuing civilians, and pushing back against the corporation’s expansion across different planets.

The story focuses heavily on large-scale planetary conflicts, with each world having its own battles, struggles, and turning points as the rebellion tries to survive and grow against an overwhelming enemy.

to join us join the VRChat group then join the discord connected to it

community.name: Specter Security Services
community.description:
Specter Security Services (SSS) is a heavy-roleplay, narrative-driven group set in a gritty, high-stakes dystopian future (circa 2077). We blend cyberpunk corporate espionage, tactical military realism, and creeping anomalous/eldritch horror into a single, cohesive universe.

In this world, you are an operative working for SSS, the private military and intelligence arm of the monolithic mega-corporation known simply as Monolith. You aren't heroes saving the world; you are corporate assets doing the dirty, bloody, and often mind-bending work required to keep the company's bottom line secure and the unknown terrors of the world contained.

If you are looking for a roleplay environment that features intense character development, strict in-character consequences, moral ambiguity, and terrifying encounters with the unknown, SSS is the place for you.

Our roleplay is strictly intended for mature writers who enjoy dark, complex storytelling. SSS operations take place across a fractured geopolitical landscape from guarding corporate assets to navigating the fragile alliances.

But bullets and politics are only half the threat.

The world of SSS is plagued by the anomalous. Our operatives regularly deploy into unmapped liminal spaces, face down flesh-warping eldritch entities, and battle deranged cults wielding thaumaturgical magic. Your character will face physical trauma, psychological horror, and the agonizing weight of impossible choices.

Players in SSS can build their characters within distinct operational branches, each offering a vastly different roleplay experience.

Plot armor does not exist in Specter Security Services. We pride ourselves on a living, breathing disciplinary and medical system where your character's choices matter.

Are you ready to sign your contract?
Monolith is always hiring. Just remember to read the fine print regarding clone rights, corporate debt, and anomalous exposure.

community.name: Helping Hands
community.description:
Helping Hands is a community that hosts sign language lessons and social events in VRChat.

We host several events weekly, with lessons available for a variety of worldwide sign languages. We also have a number of worlds to explore with interactive functionality that can help you do self-study for the sign language of your choice. You don't need an Index to sign with us! Our teachers show how to sign in VR with both Index and General VR controllers, and with our avatar assets you can extend your signing capability even further.

We sometimes host study clubs where you can sign on webcam with real Deaf people, but if you're shy, we also have Sign Zones and Game Nights where you can practice and get comfortable with your new signing buddies.

You can learn more about us and get access to our events through our Discord:
https://discord.gg/helpinghands

community.name: RWBY Journey Beyond Remnant
community.description:
RWBY JBR is a non-canon, multi-crossover AU roleplay inspired by RWBY that Features adaptation from other series and Franchises. We blend familiar canon elements with original ideas to create a shared world that grows and changes over time.
The roleplay will center on exploring the various plot points of each season‚ examining the viewpoints of each character․ It's character to note that some key details may change‚ such as the death of a character or a change in the event timeline․ As the seasons unfold‚ we'll continue to be immersed in the otherworldly realm or dimension we're in․ During the roleplay‚ the choices you make will define your character‚ accentuating both your strengths and weaknesses․ Furthermore‚ your decisions will directly influence the overarching narrative of the story․

community.name: Vtuber Research Club
community.description:
Are you a VTuber agency?
No. We are a service for VTubers. You do not need to “join up” to make use of our services.

What does the VTRC do?
We provide telepresence services, which allow VTubers to attend in-person events virtually with their avatar through the use of robots and other screens.

What kind of events do you go to?
We mostly go to VTuber, anime, pop culture, and gaming conventions. We also go to smaller community and pop-up events in venues like boba shops, community centers, and breweries.

How do the robots work?
The Beam Pro robots we use are equipped with an LCD screen, a camera, and a microphone which allow for two-way communication between a VTuber and in-person attendees. The VTuber also has full control of the robot’s movement via an app on their PC using either the WASD keys, a mouse, or even a gamepad. The robot also has a downward-facing camera which assists in navigation and helps you prevent collisions and avoid obstacles.

How does the Backpack rig work?
Our backpack rig is a large screen that one of our staff members will physically wear and carry around. A VTuber simply has to join a Discord voice channel in this server and use OBS Virtual Camera to display their avatar. While the backpack rig does not give you the freedom of remotely-controlled movement, it gives you an option in cases where the robots are not an ideal choice, e.g., the venue doesn’t allow wheeled devices, your PC setup is incompatible with the Beam software, or you have anxieties about driving the robot.

community.name: Purrfectly Imperfect
community.description:
Welcome to Purrfectly Imperfect, your new place to call home!

Hey there, new friend! We're so glad you found your way here! Take a second to breathe and get comfy, you're home now~

- About Us -
Purrfectly Imperfect is a chill 18+ SFW community built on kindness, creativity, and of course, cats. 

Let's be real: making friends is weirdly hard. Between life, work, and the chaos of public VRChat instances, making that first connection feels almost impossible nowadays, especially when social anxiety is weighing you down. That's why we created this group: to make connecting a lot less scary and a lot more fun!

 - What We Do -
We're here to create a warm, friendly, welcoming and fun space where we all can be ourselves, impurrfections and all. 

We host all kinds of fun and unique events, often with little extras sprinkled in that make them stand out. Thanks to our talented Media, Creative, and Technical teams, we are able to build custom worlds, assets, Discord bot integrations, websites and much more to make our events feel special! 

Outside of our regular events, we also organize special events to guide those navigating social anxiety. Because VRChat is better together, and everyone deserves a place to call home!

Ready to make some friends? We'd love to have you! <3

community.name: World Hopping
community.description:
At World Hopping, shared experiences and mutual respect are at the heart of everything we do. Whether it's popular classics, hidden gems, or personal favorites, we explore a variety of worlds together, spend time with one another, and create memorable moments.

We visit different worlds, exchange ideas, and enjoy the diversity of our community. Building connections, having engaging conversations, and participating in shared activities are what make our community special.

Visit our booth for more information and upcoming events.

We're a community-focused roleplay with a player-driven narrative guided by a dedicated team of full-time GMs

Even if you don't have any extra limbs, feel free to join! But don't be surprised if you suddenly find yourself with an extra pair of legs.

We invite the newbies to join are world and welcome back the love ones we haven't seen in a long time. community.name: Kochō no Yakuza
community.description:
We are a roleplay VRChat community themed after the Yakuza game series and Japanese culture in general. We wish to provide, bring together and entertain. 

Providing a friendlier place for VRChat public to roleplay in is one of the aims we wish to achieve, alongside with helping other communities with bigger projects.

Bringing together both new and veteran players who have nowhere else to go, educate people about VRChat as a whole and keeping them up to date on what is going on in this vast but confusing place.

Entertaining both the public and our own people with external and internal roleplay which are still in development. Giving people a place to feel welcomed and a place anybody can feel they belong to.

community.name: El Alba
community.description:
（EN） El Alba is a multicultural VRChat community focused on creating a welcoming, respectful, and non-toxic space for adults 18+. We organize social gatherings, world hopping, themed events, maid café experiences, movie nights, creative projects, community discussions, and collaborations with other VRChat groups. Our goal is to offer a SFW, accessible, and supportive environment where people can connect, grow, and enjoy VRChat at their own pace.

（ES） El Alba es una comunidad multicultural de VRChat enfocada en crear un espacio acogedor, respetuoso y no tóxico para adultos 18+. Organizamos reuniones sociales, world hopping, eventos temáticos, maid café, noches de películas, proyectos creativos, charlas comunitarias y colaboraciones con otros grupos de VRChat. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer un ambiente SFW, accesible y de apoyo, donde las personas puedan conectar, crecer y disfrutar VRChat a su propio ritmo.

（JP） エル・アルバは、18歳以上の大人向けに、歓迎的で、思いやりがあり、非トキシックな空間を作ることを目指している、多文化のVRChatコミュニティです。交流イベント、ワールドホッピング、テーマイベント、メイドカフェ、映画鑑賞会、創作プロジェクト、コミュニティでの会話、そして他のVRChatグループとのコラボレーションを行っています。私たちは、誰もが自分のペースでつながり、成長し、VRChatを楽しめるような、SFWで参加しやすく、支え合える環境を大切にしています。

community.name: EksCelle
community.description: I am a world creator known for making dark and gothic worlds. I mostly make worlds for DJ events. I have many upcoming projects in the pipeline. Thank you for taking the time to check out my work.

community.name: SayhoMl
community.description: Hi, I'm Sayho | A Vtuber very inspired by the Pillar of the Flame | I stream VRChat, a variety of games (I like horror games the most) and sometimes IRLs!!! | Schedule: Streams almost every day at 7:30 PM CDMX / 10:30 PM LATAM / 3:30 AM ESP

community.name: The Bakery
community.description: Demonhead/The Bakery is a group of artists that primarily focus on digital art, 3d animation, and virtual reality environments, primarily based in VRChat. We enjoy creating stories with our art, and giving people something to enjoy!

community.name: Purplexia Host Club
community.description: Purplexia Host Club is a 18+ roleplaying community located in VR Chat. Only rated 18+ for mature conversations that can take place. It is a social based roleplay that welcomes both new comers and veterans to roleplay. Our staff plays hosts, butlers and maids for the establishment. The hosts, butlers, and maids socialize with the guests, serve them drinks or whatever else they may ask for (varies depending on the map we are in), or entertain the guests. We have live performances by some of the hosts or even the guests if they feel comfortable/want to put on a performance for the other guests. We also encourage and help others build up and expand their characters as well as branch out to other roleplaying communities.

community.name: Kasvmi
community.description: Kasumi's Hinansho is for bnnuy lovers that enjoy Kasumi's music and other forms of media.

community.name: DegenTech Inc
community.description: Group of professional furries working in STEMM fields (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics, Medical). We hangout in VR and organize on Discord! Check out some of the techiest nerds you'll meet on VRchat!

community.name: Cult of Secrets
community.description:
The Cult of Secrets is a group in the world of medieval fantasy role-playing. However, beyond that, it represents a safe haven for those seeking a warm and friendly environment. Here they can be their authentic selves without fear of judgment or criticism.

Our goal is a community committed to the emotional well-being of its members, ready to offer support and solutions to everyday problems. But above all, the Cult of Secrets is a light in the darkness for those lost, offering them hope and a space for renewal.

Join this group and discover the true power of friendship, solidarity, and empathy in a world increasingly in need of these qualities.

community.name: Sonic VRChat Roleplay
community.description: We are a Sonic role-play group that focuses mainly on VRChat RPs‚ YouTube content and of course spending time with friendsǃ

community.name: ARK Station VRChat Avatar PVP
community.description: ARK Station is a VRChat Community HUB Based on Creativity, Interaction, and Having Fun. We aim to create a server/environment for people to relax, enjoy, or just hang out after a long day of Work, School, or Life. While also focusing on being able to interact with your friends on a whole new level. Providing a place where you can download Prefabs based on this idea of interaction. Letting Players Create their Avatars or Worlds And using them in our Events. We aim to push the limits of what VRChat can be, not only the things we create but each other. We are a VRChat community HUB, and all communities are welcome.

community.name: NanoBunTV
community.description: 🥕 Professional Idiot Robo-Bunny from the virtual world! 🥕 Jack of all trades, master of... maybe a few (but it's all too much to fit into this little bio)

community.name: Final Three Braincells Podcast
community.description:
Comedy Podcast recorded in VRChat
"Three idiots use up the last bit of their collective sanity in order to host a... podcast, of all things?"

community.name: Maple Tree
community.description: Maple Tree is a cozy, creative community for those who love exploring new things, We're big on world hopping, gaming, anime, VR Events, & Culture.
